text:
O
TATWATAHA BEDHAHA"
When a native is born, these planets are in various signs (in
directional aspects) in the form of rays. Those radiations define
and determine the nature and future of the native.
CAN IT BE PRACTICALLY PROVED THAT
PLANETS DO EXERT INFLUENCE ON HUMAN BEINGS
AND OTHER CREATURES.
To illustrate, during Ashadha and Shravana Masas, (i.e., July
and August months) Sun rays do not have uniform distribution
over the earth, leading to cloudiness. During those period creatures
also cannot work actively. Because of cloudiness, a sort of
laziness is found in the atmosphere and in the minds of all
creatures. All creatures have mind, intellect and ego. The planets
radiate the sun rays falling on them, onto the native, according to
their positions in natal and transitory charts, and these radiations
effect mind, intellect, and the ego of human beings and other
creatures in the same way as clouds control the distribution of Sun
rays over the earth.
